prompt: Add request/response logging middleware with timing

turns.content:
<task>
Add request/response logging middleware that logs method, path, status code, and response time.
</task>

1	 from fastapi import FastAPI
2	 from api.routes import router
3	 
4	 app = FastAPI(title="My Service")
5	 app.include_router(router)

arguments.query: FastAPI middleware timing request response logging Starlette BaseHTTPMiddleware

turns.content:
1. FastAPI Middleware - https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/tutorial/middleware/
   Use @app.middleware("http") or BaseHTTPMiddleware. Access request and response.
2. Starlette Middleware - https://www.starlette.io/middleware/
   BaseHTTPMiddleware provides dispatch(request, call_next) pattern.

arguments.title: FastAPI/Starlette middleware pattern
arguments.content:
@app.middleware('http')
async def middleware(request: Request, call_next):
    response = await call_next(request)
    return response
Or use BaseHTTPMiddleware subclass.
For timing: import time; start = time.perf_counter(); ... elapsed = time.perf_counter() - start
Access: request.method, request.url.path, response.status_code

import time
import logging
from starlette.middleware.base import BaseHTTPMiddleware
from starlette.requests import Request

log = logging.getLogger('http')


class RequestLoggingMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
    async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next):
        start = time.perf_counter()
        response = await call_next(request)
        elapsed_ms = (time.perf_counter() - start) * 1000
        log.info(
            '%s %s %d %.1fms',
            request.method,
            request.url.path,
            response.status_code,
            elapsed_ms
        )
        response.headers['X-Response-Time'] = f'{elapsed_ms:.1f}ms'
        return response

from fastapi import FastAPI
from api.routes import router
from middleware.logging import RequestLoggingMiddleware

app = FastAPI(title="My Service")
app.add_middleware(RequestLoggingMiddleware)
app.include_router(router)

arguments.message: Logging middleware is active. Every request logs: `GET /api/users 200 12.3ms`. Also adds X-Response-Time header to responses for client-side visibility.

arguments.summary: Added RequestLoggingMiddleware using Starlette BaseHTTPMiddleware. Logs method, path, status, and timing. Adds X-Response-Time header.
arguments.final_answer: Request logging middleware added. Logs method, path, status code, and response time in ms. Adds X-Response-Time header to all responses.
